value.found_quote: [Desktop scheduled tasks](/en/desktop-scheduled-tasks): run locally on your machine
value.rationale: The page describes Desktop scheduled tasks as a scheduling option that runs on the user's machine with access to local files and tools. The comparison table lists Desktop as "Runs on: Your machine" with "Access to local files: Yes," and the text says "Use Desktop tasks when you need access to local files and tools." The offering is presented as currently available.
